_description: Multi-hop retrieval test cases. Each query requires combining info from 2+ sources to fully answer.

test_cases.query: How does FastAPI validate request bodies using Pydantic models and what errors does it return for invalid data?
test_cases.description: Requires: (1) FastAPI route + Body() usage, (2) Pydantic validation, (3) exception handler for validation errors

hops.description: FastAPI route definition with Body/BaseModel parameter

test_cases.query: How to set up an async database session in FastAPI using SQLAlchemy with dependency injection?
test_cases.description: Requires: (1) SQLAlchemy async engine setup, (2) FastAPI Depends(), (3) session lifecycle management

hops.description: SQLAlchemy async engine and session creation

test_cases.query: How to implement OAuth2 authentication in FastAPI with password hashing and JWT tokens?
test_cases.description: Requires: (1) OAuth2 scheme, (2) password hashing, (3) JWT token creation/validation

hops.description: Password hashing with bcrypt or passlib

test_cases.query: How does HTTPX handle SSL certificate verification and what happens when connecting through a proxy?
test_cases.description: Requires: (1) SSL/TLS config, (2) proxy configuration, (3) transport layer

test_cases.query: How to build a FastAPI WebSocket endpoint that broadcasts messages to multiple connected clients with authentication?
test_cases.description: Requires: (1) WebSocket endpoint, (2) connection manager pattern, (3) auth middleware for WS

test_cases.query: How does Pydantic handle nested model serialization with custom types and what JSON schema does it generate?
test_cases.description: Requires: (1) nested model definition, (2) custom type/serializer, (3) JSON schema generation

test_cases.query: How to configure FastAPI middleware stack with CORS, rate limiting, and request logging?
test_cases.description: Requires: (1) CORS middleware, (2) rate limiting, (3) custom logging middleware

test_cases.query: How to implement file upload with streaming in FastAPI, validate the file type, and store it with metadata?
test_cases.description: Requires: (1) UploadFile endpoint, (2) MIME type validation, (3) storage + metadata

test_cases.query: How does HTTPX implement request retry with exponential backoff and what events does it expose for monitoring?
test_cases.description: Requires: (1) retry/transport, (2) backoff logic, (3) event hooks

test_cases.query: How to set up Pydantic Settings management with environment variables, .env files, and validation?
test_cases.description: Requires: (1) BaseSettings, (2) env file loading, (3) field validation on settings
